_verification.note: Not independently diffed against src/shared/errors.ts / supabase/functions/_shared/errors.ts this pass. Spot-checked only: no false deployment-status claims found (codes describe the shared contract, not per-function live status), so left unmodified rather than rewritten without cause.

note: Error catalog for Scena shared response contract. These codes are used by both live edge functions and the planned v2 router.

errors.description: Authentication is required.
The authenticated user is not authorized to perform this action.
The user's account profile is incomplete.
The user has no active organization membership.
The organization is suspended.
A requested resource could not be found.
Request validation failed for one or more fields.
The screen pairing code is incorrect.
The screen pairing code has expired.
The pairing code has already been used.
Too many failed pairing attempts; the code is locked temporarily.
The screen is not in a valid state for the requested action.
The screen's credential has been revoked.
The device credential is invalid.
The Team has reached its screen limit.
The screen is already live in another session.
The requested session action requires a draft session.
The requested session action requires an active session.
The selected layout or configuration is invalid for the current display mode.
The requested presentation asset is not ready for playback.
A scheduled automation failed to execute.
The requested resource belongs to another organization.
An unexpected internal error occurred.
An active Team is required for this operation.
The user already belongs to an active Team.
The Team has exceeded its plan limits.
A paid plan is required to continue.
The current plan does not include this feature.
An active subscription is required.
The subscription is inactive.
The Team has reached its member limit.
The Team has reached its Board limit.
The Team has reached its Display limit.
The Team has reached its concurrent Session limit.
A Session may contain at most four Displays.
The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.
An invitation is invalid or expired.
The invitation email does not match the signed-in user.
The Display credential is invalid.
The Display credential has been revoked.
A background processing operation failed.
The requested resource was not found.
A repeated request was sent with a different payload for the same idempotency key.
